name: Jewelcrafting Table and Jeweler
pages: $(item)Jewelcrafting Table$() can be used as a workstation for villagers or for players to do some craft.

pages.title: Jeweler
pages.text: Villagers who work on jewelcrafting table will become $(thing)Jewelers$(), with whom they can trade some AnvilCraft related items, including important smithing templates.

pages.title: Copying
pages.text: Players can use Jewelcrafting Table to $(thing)Copying$(). Only a few items can be copy. Put the item you want to copying and materials, you can produce an imitation with $(thing)Vanishing Curse$().

pages.title: Banner Patterns
pages.text: All Banner Patterns can be copy like this recipe.

pages.title: Music Discs
pages.text: All Music Discs can be copy like this recipe.

pages.title: Pottery Sherds
pages.text: All Pottery Sherds can be copy like this recipe.

pages.title: Armor Trim Smithing Template
pages.text: All Armor Trim Smithing Templates can be copy like this recipe.
